actionUnits.condition: PointerClick EventTrigger (eventID=4) on Building3 (EventTrigger MonoBehaviour id=1554268812, script guid d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1) invokes Residential.showlabel() on MonoBehaviour id=1554268810 (script guid 10a92b1b4549024468ecbc96831def68). Expected result: Player/child[1] TextMeshPro text updates to first 20 chars of 'Residential:Kumo Apartment' => 'Residential:Kumo Apa'.

EventTrigger configured in scene (MonoBehaviour id=1554268812, guid=d0b148fe25e99eb48b9724523833bab1, eventID=4 PointerClick) targets Residential.showlabel() on Building3 (MonoBehaviour id=1554268810, guid=10a92b1b4549024468ecbc96831def68). Residential.Start() finds Player and assigns label = Player.child[1]. Expected: TextMeshPro on Player.child[1] updates to first 20 chars of 'Residential:Kumo Apartment' => 'Residential:Kumo Apa'.
